title: IELTS Writing Practice Test 4
description: Writing task on health and lifestyle

writingTasks.prompt: The bar chart below shows the percentage of population in different age groups in four European countries. Summarise the information and make comparisons where relevant.

In today's world, many people are living longer than ever before. Some people say an aging population creates problems, while others think it brings advantages. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.
